name: md-editor
description: WYSIWYG Markdown editor for VS Code using Milkdown Crepe.

mdEditor.theme.markdownDescription: Theme used by the MD Editor webview.

enumDescriptions: Save into a .attachments folder next to the Markdown file.
Save directly beside the Markdown file.
Save into a workspace-root relative folder.
Ask for a folder each time an attachment is uploaded.
mdEditor.attachments.locationMode.markdownDescription: Where MD Editor saves uploaded attachments.

mdEditor.attachments.folderName.markdownDescription:
Folder name created beside the current Markdown file.

Only used when `Location Mode` is `markdown-folder-attachments`.

mdEditor.attachments.path.markdownDescription:
Workspace-relative folder for attachments.

Only used when `Location Mode` is `workspace-relative-path`. Do not use an absolute path like `/home/name/...`.

mdEditor.attachments.alwaysUseOriginalFi.markdownDescription: Use the uploaded file's original filename when saving attachments. Existing files are never overwritten.

mdEditor.attachments.alwaysConfirmNameAn.markdownDescription: Ask for the attachment folder and filename before every attachment is saved.

mdEditor.attachments.askBeforeDeletingFi.markdownDescription: Ask before deleting a local attachment file from disk when its image reference is removed from the MD Editor.

mdEditor.attachments.generatedNameDigits.markdownDescription: Number of digits in generated attachment filenames, for example `features-000000001.png`.

mdEditor.tables.floatingToolbar.markdownDescription: Show MD Editor's floating table toolbar when the cursor is inside a table.

mdEditor.tables.contextMenu.markdownDescription: Enable MD Editor's right-click table action menu.

mdEditor.tables.milkdownControls.markdownDescription: Show Milkdown Crepe's default table handles and grid-line add controls.

mdEditor.tables.slashMenu.markdownDescription: Enable MD Editor's table-cell slash menu. Type `/` as the first character in a table cell to add/delete rows or columns.

mdEditor.tables.defaultRows.markdownDescription: Default number of rows used when inserting a new GFM Markdown table.

mdEditor.tables.defaultColumns.markdownDescription: Default number of columns used when inserting a new GFM Markdown table.

enumDescriptions: Insert a table immediately using the configured default rows and columns.
Open a row/column picker every time Insert Table is selected.
mdEditor.tables.insertBehavior.markdownDescription: Controls whether Insert Table uses the configured default size or asks for rows and columns each time.

mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowLanguage.markdownDescription: Always show the selected language label on code blocks instead of only showing it on hover.

mdEditor.codeBlocks.alwaysShowCopyButton.markdownDescription: Always show the code block Copy button instead of only showing it on hover.

mdEditor.dateTime.dateFormat.markdownDescription: Date format used by MD Editor timestamp tools. Supported tokens include `yyyy`, `yy`, `MM`, `M`, `dd`, and `d`.

mdEditor.dateTime.timeFormat.markdownDescription: Time format used by MD Editor timestamp tools. Supported tokens include `HH`, `H`, `hh`, `h`, `mm`, `ss`, and `a` for AM/PM.

mdEditor.dateTime.lastUpdatedTemplate.markdownDescription: Template inserted or updated by the Last Updated timestamp actions. Available placeholders: `{date}`, `{time}`, `{datetime}`.

mdEditor.dateTime.historyEntryTemplate.markdownDescription: Template inserted by the history entry timestamp action. Available placeholders: `{date}`, `{time}`, `{datetime}`.

mdEditor.dateTime.customTemplate.markdownDescription: Template inserted by the custom date/time snippet action. Available placeholders: `{date}`, `{time}`, `{datetime}`.

mdEditor.dateTime.inlineSlashShortcuts.markdownDescription: Enable lightweight inline date/time shortcuts such as `/date`, `/time`, `/datetime`, `/updated`, and `/history`. Shortcuts are replaced only when accepted with `Tab` or `Enter` and are ignored inside URLs, paths, and words.
